base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of stage_layout_vertical_scroll — a tile (level_layout) from 1987 contra. Vertical-scrolling stage layout — 256×2176 = 1-screen-wide × 9-screens-tall. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Vertical-scrolling stage layout — 256×2176 = 1-screen-wide × 9-screens-tall; waterfall/tower ascent section
